---
title: "test_bridge_integration.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_bridge_integration.py"
loc: 18
complexity: 3
logic_score: 6.02
style_score: 3.88
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.61
---

## Intent
The `test_bridge_integration.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestAntigravityBridgeIntegration, test_successful_request, test_invalid_query_timeout. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestAntigravityBridgeIntegration, test_successful_request, test_invalid_query_timeout. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge](file://src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge)

### Exports
- `TestAntigravityBridgeIntegration`
- `test_successful_request`
- `test_invalid_query_timeout`
